title: Jailhouse Rock
why_this_song: Jailhouse Rock by Elvis Presley (1957) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.
teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "rock" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "rock" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "jailhouse" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "jailhouse" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: You should've heard them knocked out jailbirds sing
Was dancin' to the Jailhouse Rock
Everybody in the whole cell block

exercises.prompt_en: "Jailhouse Rock" was released in 1957. Do you think the themes in the song are timeless, or do they feel dated? Give one example from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: "Jailhouse Rock" foi lançada em 1957. Você acha que os temas da música são atemporais ou já parecem datados? Dê um exemplo do que ouviu.

exercises.prompt_en: Imagine you are making a short film with "Jailhouse Rock" as the soundtrack. What scene would you show while the chorus plays?
exercises.prompt_pt: Imagine que você vai fazer um curta com "Jailhouse Rock" como trilha sonora. Que cena você mostraria no momento do refrão?

exercises.prompt_en: The singer makes a claim or statement in this song. Do you agree with it? Use evidence from the lyrics to support your answer.
exercises.prompt_pt: O cantor faz uma afirmação nessa música. Você concorda? Use pelo menos um verso para defender sua resposta.

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:

exercises.prompt_en: If you could ask Elvis Presley one question about "Jailhouse Rock", what would it be and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse perguntar uma coisa para Elvis Presley sobre "Jailhouse Rock", o que seria e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: Describe the mood of "Jailhouse Rock" in three adjectives. What part of the song makes you feel that way?
exercises.prompt_pt: Descreva o clima de "Jailhouse Rock" em três adjetivos. Que parte da música te faz sentir isso?
